articles.author: Scharon Harding
articles.title: Yearslong fight over users’ right to tweak smart TV software heads to trial - Ars Technica
articles.description: Access to TV OS's source code could allow users to limit ads, tracking.

articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026 - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.
articles.content: Google isn’t finished infusing AI into your inbox. On Tuesday at their IO 2026 developer conference, the tech giant announced an expansion of its “AI Inbox” functionality for Gmail, which is adding c… [+3724 chars]
